title: Eco-Tamarin Delight
description: An earthy and dense Dutch dish featuring a tamarind ball poach that is dairy-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat almond milk in a pot until warm.
Add tamarind concentrate, ground flaxseed, and vanilla extract. Simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened.
In a separate bowl, mix together almond flour and coconut oil to form a paste. Gradually add this mixture into the simmering milk, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
Cook on low heat for another 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until fully incorporated and smooth.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Once cooled, pour into a mold or dish to set (approximately 30 minutes).
